title: mcywilizacja.pl
description: Built for the mcywilizacja.pl private server, this pack has something for everyone. Engineers, builders, and survivalists alike will find rich landscapes and exciting challenges to explore.
body:
![mCywilizacja.pl logo, showing 4 admins and a potential player over the name of the server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f355c575d7e5cc8bf37fc562c442775c80485b61.png)

# mCywilizacja.pl
**Calling all creative engineers and survivalists!**

Welcome to the mCywilizacja.pl modpack, designed for players on the private mcywilizacja.pl Minecraft server. We've handpicked mods to fuel our collaborative creativity and create an immersive cozy survival experience.

The amazing Create mod and its diverse addons are the heart of this modpack. Craft incredible contraptions, automate your home, and build like never before. But it's not just about the machines – we've added cozy living mods to make your base feel like a true home.

We're revitalizing the spirit of a decade-old roleplaying server by combining the intricate machinery of Create with the atmospheric touches of the [Let's Do] mod ecosystem.

Dynamic seasons will keep you on your toes, while enhanced survival mechanics and a variety of wildlife add a whole new level of challenge and wonder. Plus, the pack is optimized for smooth multiplayer performance, so you can share the fun with friends.

If you love the depth of Create engineering but also appreciate immersive survival and charming, creative builds, then this is the perfect pack for you!

## Mod list

Please note that this modpack includes some assets that are currently not hosted on Modrinth.
- Lucky's Wardrobe mod by LuckyOwl available at [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/luckys-wardrobe) - it adds some decorative and practical clothing sets
- Flerovium mod by moepus available at [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flerovium) - it makes item rendering faster
